# Gift Card Expiration

Acme Shop's Source documents disagree on gift card expiration: gift_card_terms.md states cards never expire, while gift_card_faq.md states a 12-month expiration with forfeiture of unused balance. This page intentionally does not pick a winner — see open_questions.

[Source: gift_card_terms.md#expiration]
[Source: gift_card_faq.md#expiration]
